title: A Ores Mod
description:
This mod adds Ruby and Mythril to your world!
Mine these new ores to craft custom tools, weapons, and armor. Ruby gear is fast and sharp, while Mythril is tough and durable — perfect for adventurers looking for stronger gear and something new to explore.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f623cdeb1035c853fabaece2fcac95565c321412.png)
Tired of the same old Minecraft ores? This mod is for you.
Say goodbye to boring iron and diamond this mod brings Ruby and Mythril into the game!
Find them deep underground, craft unique tools, weapons, and full armor sets. Ruby is fast and deadly, Mythril is strong and reliable. Perfect for players who want fresh materials and better gear without breaking the vanilla vibe.
